# Find optimal K
k_range = range(2, 15)
metrics = {'inertia': [], 'silhouette': [], 'calinski': [], 'davies': []}

for k in k_range:
    km = KMeans(n_clusters=k, random_state=42, n_init=10)
    km.fit(tfidf_pca)
    metrics['inertia'].append(km.inertia_)
    metrics['silhouette'].append(silhouette_score(tfidf_pca, km.labels_))
    metrics['calinski'].append(calinski_harabasz_score(tfidf_pca, km.labels_))
    metrics['davies'].append(davies_bouldin_score(tfidf_pca, km.labels_))

optimal_k = list(k_range)[np.argmin(metrics['davies'])]
print(f'✅ Optimal K (Davies-Bouldin): {optimal_k}')

# Visualize metrics
fig, axes = plt.subplots(2, 2, figsize=(14, 10))
axes[0,0].plot(k_range, metrics['inertia'], 'bo-'); axes[0,0].set_title('Elbow Method (Inertia ↓)')
axes[0,1].plot(k_range, metrics['silhouette'], 'go-'); axes[0,1].set_title('Silhouette Score ↑')
axes[1,0].plot(k_range, metrics['calinski'], 'ro-'); axes[1,0].set_title('Calinski-Harabasz ↑')
axes[1,1].plot(k_range, metrics['davies'], 'mo-'); axes[1,1].set_title('Davies-Bouldin ↓')
for ax in axes.flat:
    ax.axvline(x=optimal_k, color='gray', linestyle='--', alpha=0.7, label=f'K={optimal_k}')
    ax.legend()
    ax.set_xlabel('Number of Clusters (K)')
plt.suptitle('K-Means Clustering Metrics', fontsize=16, fontweight='bold', y=1.02)
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
